title: Snappy Thai Style Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Thai stir fry made with snappy vegetables and a tangy lime sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the snappy green beans and polish sausage (if using) to the skillet.
3. Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice, hoisin sauce, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and red pepper flakes.
5. Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
7. Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with sliced lime wedges if desired.
